The said equity shares shall rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company in all respect. In this regard, we wish to inform you that the Company has received intimation from Fino PayTech Limited on January 25, 2022, regarding conversion of 1,500,000 convertible warrants held by the Company into fully paid equity shares of face value Rs.10 per share of Fino PayTech Limited in the ratio of 1:1. Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with the SEBI circular no. CIR/CFD/CMD/4/2015 dated September 9, 2015, please find enclosed requisite details'.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Updates","difference":"00:00:12","dt":"26012022190644","exchdisstime":"26-Jan-2022 19:06:56","fileSize":"-","hasXbrl":false,"old_new":null,"orgid":null,"seq_id":"105218872","smIndustry":null,"sm_isin":"INE765G01017","sm_name":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited","sort_date":"2022-01-26 19:06:44","symbol":"ICICIGI"},{"an_dt":"25-Jan-2022 13:55:06","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_25012022135506_ScheduleofAnalystMeet24012022.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Schedule of meet","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. 20:48:57","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_08092021204857_SEIntimation.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding allotment of 35756194 securities pursuant to Scheme of Arrangement/Amalgamation at its meeting held on September 08, 2021��informing about receipt of the detailed order of Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench sanctioning the Scheme of Arrangement amongst Bharti AXA General Insurance Company Limited ('Bharti AXA') and ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited ('the Company') and their respective shareholders and creditors ('Scheme') and receipt of final approval of Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India to the Scheme, respectively.Further, in accordance with the Scheme, the Board at its Meeting held today i.e. Wednesday, September 8, 2021, has allotted 35,756,194 equity shares to the following shareholders of Bharti AXA.The said equity shares shall rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company in all respect.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Allotment of Securities","difference":"00:00:05","dt":"08092021204857","exchdisstime":"08-Sep-2021 20:46:32","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_08092021204632_SEIntimation.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on September 08, 2021��informing about receipt of the detailed order of Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench sanctioning the Scheme of Arrangement and receipt of final approval of IRDAI to the Scheme, respectively. Further, in accordance with the Scheme, the Board at its Meeting held today i.e. Wednesday, September 8, 2021, has allotted 35,756,194 equity shares to the following shareholders of Bharti AXA General Insurance Company Limited. Pursuant to the NCLT Order and the effectiveness of the Scheme, the Authorised Share Capital of the Company stands increased to ? 550,00,00,000 divided into 55,00,00,000. Further, the Board based on recommendation of the Board Nomination and Remuneration Committee, has approved grant of 75,000 stock options to eligible employees of the Company under the ICICI Lombard Employees Stock Option Scheme-2005.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Outcome of Board Meeting","difference":"00:00:05","dt":"08092021204632","exchdisstime":"08-Sep-2021 20:46:37","fileSize":"-","hasXbrl":false,"old_new":null,"orgid":null,"seq_id":"105067499","smIndustry":null,"sm_isin":"INE765G01017","sm_name":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited","sort_date":"2021-09-08 20:46:32","symbol":"ICICIGI"},{"an_dt":"07-Sep-2021 16:00:37","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_07092021160037_ESOSIntimationSeptI.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Allotment of 21710 Shares.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"ESOP/ESOS/ESPS","difference":"00:00:05","dt":"07092021160037","exchdisstime":"07-Sep-2021 16:00:42","fileSize":"-","hasXbrl":false,"old_new":null,"orgid":null,"seq_id":"105065480","smIndustry":null,"sm_isin":"INE765G01017","sm_name":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited","sort_date":"2021-09-07 16:00:37","symbol":"ICICIGI"},{"an_dt":"07-Sep-2021 15:24:49","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_07092021152449_ScheduleofAnalystMeet06092021.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Accordingly, the Company would like to exercise Call Option and redeem the Debentures in full on July 28, 2021 along with final interest due, post receipt of the necessary regulatory/statutory approvals.The Company has filed necessary application seeking approval of Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India ( IRDAI ) for exercising Call Option on the subordinated Debt issued by the Company, pursuant to IRDAI (Other Forms of Capital) Regulations, 2015 and the approval of IRDAI is expected shortly.'.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Updates","difference":"00:00:20","dt":"30062021222833","exchdisstime":"30-Jun-2021 22:28:53","fileSize":"-","hasXbrl":false,"old_new":null,"orgid":null,"seq_id":"104976142","smIndustry":null,"sm_isin":"INE765G01017","sm_name":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited","sort_date":"2021-06-30 22:28:33","symbol":"ICICIGI"},{"an_dt":"30-Jun-2021 14:18:02","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_30062021141802_ScheduleofAnalystMeet29062021.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Please note that in pursuance of the Order and as directed therein, a notice along with the Explanatory Statement under Sections 230(3), 232(1), 232(2) and 102 of the Companies Act, 2013 read with Rule 6(3) of the Companies (Compromises, Arrangements and Amalgamations) Rules, 2016, along with copy of the Scheme and other Annexures, has been issued to the Unsecured Creditors (including unsecured debenture holders) of the Company as on September 30, 2020, under Section 230(3) of the Companies Act, 2013, having value of INR 5,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Lakh only) and more (constituting about 98.04% of the outstanding unsecured creditors of Company), stating therein that they may submit their representations in relation to the Scheme, if any, to the Tribunal, within thirty days from the date of receipt of the said notice and copy of such representations shall simultaneously be served upon the Company.'.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Updates","difference":"00:00:05","dt":"20012021215213","exchdisstime":"20-Jan-2021 (IST) for investors and analysts to discuss the scheme of arrangement between the Company and Bharti AXA General Insurance Company Limited (copy of invite is attached).Also find attached herewith a copy of an investor presentation pertaining to the above.The aforesaid information is also being hosted on the website of the Company viz. www.icicilombard.com.You are requested to kindly take the same on your records.'.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Updates","difference":"00:00:06","dt":"22082020113048","exchdisstime":"22-Aug-2020 and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ( Listing Regulations ) read with Securities and Exchange Board of India ( SEBI ) Circular No. CIR/CFD/CMD/4/2015 dated September 9, 2015 we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited at its Meeting held on August 21, 2020, have, inter alia, considered and approved a scheme of arrangement amongst Bharti AXA General Insurance Company Limited ( Demerged Company or Bharti AXA ) and ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited ( Company or Resulting Company ) and their respective shareholders and creditors ( Scheme ).","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Scheme of the Exchange about Credit Rating: This is with reference to our letter dated April 18, 2020, regarding reaffirmation of \"iAAA'''' rating to the Claims Paying Ability of the Company issued by ICRA Limited vide its letter dated April 17, 2020.Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule Ill of the Securities and Exchange Board of India ('SEBI') (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that ICRA Limited had withdrawn the 'iAAA' (pronounced as I Triple A) rating assigned to the Claims Paying Ability of ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited.The rating withdrawal is pursuant to the amendment in the SEBI (Credit Rating Agencies) (Amendment) Regulations, 2018, wherein a credit rating agency cannot offer claims paying ability rating services.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Credit captioned subject matter, we wish to inform you that Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (\"IRDAI\") vide its letter no. Audited Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2019.2. Appointment of Mr. Murali Sivaraman (DIN: 01461231) as an Additional Director in the category of Non-executive, Independent Director of the Company for a term of five years effective from January 17, 2020, subject to approval of Members of the Company.3. Re-appointment of Mr. Sanjeev Mantri (DIN: 06559989) as Whole-time Director, designated as Executive Director-Retail of the Company, for a period of five years effective from May 2, 2020, subject to approval of Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India and Members of the Company.4.  Increase in aggregate limit of Stock Options from a maximum of 5% of the issued Shares of the Company to a maximum of 7% of the issued Shares of the Company from time to time, on the date(s) of grant of Stock Option(s) under the ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited-Employees Stock Option Scheme 2005, subject to the approval of Members of the Company.","bflag":null,"csvName":null,"desc":"Outcome of Board Meeting","difference":"-","dt":"17012020164800","exchdisstime":"-","fileSize":"-","hasXbrl":false,"old_new":null,"orgid":null,"seq_id":"104064044","smIndustry":null,"sm_isin":"INE765G01017","sm_name":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited","sort_date":"2020-01-17 16:48:00","symbol":"ICICIGI"},{"an_dt":"10-Jan-2020 19:32:00","attFileSize":null,"attchmntFile":"https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ICICIGI_10012020193142_EarningsCall_264.pdf","attchmntText":"ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con.
